name: Fdr's Favorite Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
Approx. Cook Time: 50 minutes
Preheat oven to 425°F.
Prepare the 9-inch pastry shell and cook for 5 minutes at 425°F (using a Speedy Pat-in-Pastry method).
Turn down the oven temperature to 350°F.
In a large bowl, cream together butter and sugar. Add corn syrup, eggs, and vanilla; mix well.
Stir in pecans. Pour into prepared crust.
Bake at 350°F for about 40-50 minutes or until filling is firm.
Cool before cutting.
